description:
UsageWidget puts your account usage at a glance on iPhone and the Home Screen. Connect it to your self-hosted UsageWidget server to see Codex, Claude, and Grok usage windows, reset times, forecasts, and alerts in one focused dashboard.

Features:
- Home Screen widget for quick usage checks
- Codex, Claude, and Grok provider views
- Remaining-usage and reset-time details
- Configurable usage alerts and quiet hours
- Release-readiness checks for server and notification setup
- Secure manual or QR-based connection to your own server

UsageWidget is designed for a private, self-hosted setup. Your server address and access token are stored in the iOS Keychain. The developer does not operate your production server or collect your usage data.
promotionalText: Keep your account usage, reset times, forecasts, and alerts close at hand.
whatsNew: Initial release of UsageWidget for iPhone and the Home Screen.
